title: Promote the Delegation contract (fan-out rubric) into the always-loaded doctrine layer
action: Add a fan-out critical rule to skills/bee-hive/templates/AGENTS.block.md stating the D2 rubric (a mechanical step reading >3 files, or content needed only as a digest, dispatches down-tier as an I/O worker) and that decide-altitude (gates, synthesis, decisions, human conversation) stays on the session model; state that it holds in every phase including plain conversation turns where no bee skill routed. Add the matching red flag. Re-sync root AGENTS.md from the template via self-onboard. Add a census test in templates/tests/test_lib.mjs asserting the delegation anchor stays in AGENTS.block.md.
must_haves: AGENTS.block.md Critical rules carries a fan-out rule stating the D2 rubric and that decide-altitude stays on the session model
the rule applies in every phase including plain conversation turns with no skill routing
red flags line gains the inline-fan-out-miss flag
root AGENTS.md re-synced from the template
census test asserts AGENTS.block.md keeps the delegation anchor
